name: r5: clean release build wall-clock for pi-coding-agent

description: baseline: lto=fat, codegen-units=1, opt-level=z, default linker (ld), musl static target

asi.note: fat LTO + cgu=1 is the slow path. mold + lto=thin + cgu=16 should give the biggest single-shot win. Size has 439 KiB headroom — comfortable.
